failedAssertions.reason: Global graph throughput (15.1 tok/s) is only 0.72x vs C dispatch (21.1 tok/s), below the 95% threshold. C_PLAN_OK=False means the C graph dispatch extension is not active — Python replay loop eliminates the performance benefit of graph capture.

C_PLAN_OK=False — c_graph_dispatch.so C extension not wired into global graph decode state. Global graph replay uses Python fallback loop instead of C extension, causing the same overhead as cached+stream dispatch.
